function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"summary": "Generated BDD scenarios for plan-workflow", "deliverable": {"scenarios": [{"given": "the API server is running", "when": "a GET request is sent to /hello", "then": ["a 200 status code is returned", "the response body contains a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a greeting"], "title": "A GET request is sent to /hello"}, {"given": "the API server is running", "when": "a GET request is sent to /goodbye", "then": ["a 200 status code is returned", "the response body contains a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a farewell"], "title": "A GET request is sent to /goodbye"}, {"given": "the API server is running", "when": "a GET request is sent to an unknown endpoint", "then": ["a 404 status code is returned"], "title": "A GET request is sent to an unknown endpoint"}]}}
